Container.Name: Starr
Container.Overview:
Web UI for diagnosing and repairing the SQLite databases used by Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Sportarr, Readarr, Prowlarr, Whisparr, and Bazarr.
Safely stops the target *arr container, takes a (zstd-compressed) timestamped backup, runs SQLite PRAGMA repairs (integrity check, FK repair, WAL checkpoint, VACUUM, REINDEX, ANALYZE) on the idle database, then starts the container back up. Repair output streams live to the browser via SSE — scheduled runs stream into the same log.
Features: cron scheduler with skip-if-clean, multiple instances per app (e.g. a second Sonarr), run history with last-run pill + pre-repair time estimate + per-instance trend charts, one-click restore from any backup, mid-VACUUM cancel (real SQLite interrupt), per-instance backup retention up to 1 year, and notifications on completion via Apprise (Discord/Telegram/ntfy/Pushover/…), Signal (signal-cli-rest-api), or plain JSON webhooks.
With the Docker socket mounted and a single /appdata mount pointed at your host appdata root, Starr auto-discovers each *arr container — its URL, container name, and database path — so you only need to paste the API keys and click Save Credentials.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Starr web dashboard.

Config.Name: Appdata root
Config.Description: Host appdata root. Starr uses Docker introspection to find each *arr's /config inside this mount, so a single path mount replaces the four per-app mounts the old template had. Read-write because VACUUM/REINDEX/FK repair write to the source DB.

Config.Name: Backups
Config.Description: Where timestamped database backups are stored. Backups are auto-pruned based on MAX_BACKUP_AGE_DAYS.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Mount the host Docker socket so Starr can auto-discover *arr containers and stop/start them around repairs (more reliable than the app's shutdown API on hosts with a container restart policy). Leave blank to disable Docker-managed operation.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: UID the container runs as. Must own — or share a group with — the *arr config dirs under your appdata root so VACUUM/REINDEX can write the source DB. Unraid default: 99 (nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: GID the container runs as. Unraid default: 100 (users).

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Web UI access key. Anyone who can reach the port can use the UI without this set — pick a strong random value.

Config.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Log verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR.

Config.Name: MAX_BACKUP_AGE_DAYS
Config.Description: Number of days to keep backups before auto-pruning. Set to 0 to disable pruning.

Config.Name: SONARR_APIKEY
Config.Description: Sonarr API key (Settings › General › API Key). Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: RADARR_APIKEY
Config.Description: Radarr API key. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: LIDARR_APIKEY
Config.Description: Lidarr API key. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: SPORTARR_APIKEY
Config.Description: Sportarr API key. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: READARR_APIKEY
Config.Description: Readarr API key. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: PROWLARR_APIKEY
Config.Description: Prowlarr API key. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: WHISPARR_APIKEY
Config.Description: Whisparr API key. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: BAZARR_APIKEY
Config.Description: Bazarr API key (Settings - General - Security). Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: SONARR_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Override the discovered Sonarr URL. Format: http://host:port[/urlbase].

Config.Name: RADARR_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Override the discovered Radarr URL.

Config.Name: LIDARR_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Override the discovered Lidarr URL.

Config.Name: SPORTARR_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Override the discovered Sportarr URL.

Config.Name: READARR_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Override the discovered Readarr URL.

Config.Name: PROWLARR_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Override the discovered Prowlarr URL.

Config.Name: WHISPARR_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Override the discovered Whisparr URL.

Config.Name: BAZARR_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Override the discovered Bazarr URL.
